title: Coord session registry entry
description: A registry/<session>.json record. Written by `coord register`; the heartbeat/heartbeat_iso fields are refreshed by `coord heartbeat` and `coord checkpoint`.

role.description: Session role, e.g. orchestrator, researcher, editor.

branch.description: Git branch this session works on.

worktree.description: Absolute path to the session's worktree; used to resolve the acting session in the write-scope hook.

owned_paths.description: Comma-separated globs (from --paths) this session is allowed to write.

heartbeat.description: Epoch seconds of the last heartbeat; compared against HEARTBEAT_STALE_SEC to decide liveness.

heartbeat_iso.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the last heartbeat.
